name: tech-auditor
label: Technology Auditor
description: Focus on technical depth, architecture, and engineering best practices
questions: How have other projects solved this technical problem?
What are the architectural patterns used by similar systems?
What are the performance characteristics of existing solutions?
What technology stacks are commonly used?
What are the known limitations or scalability issues?
What best practices emerge from open-source projects?
What technical debt or anti-patterns should we avoid?
